stereoscopic.options.group.name: Stereoscopic
stereoscopic.options.mode.name: Mode
stereoscopic.options.mode.tooltip: Selects the stereoscopic output mode. SBS Half splits the framebuffer left/right at half horizontal resolution per eye, suitable for VR virtual-monitor passthrough and 3D SBS displays.
stereoscopic.options.ipd.name: IPD (meters)
stereoscopic.options.ipd.tooltip: Interpupillary distance — the horizontal eye separation used to compute per-eye camera offset. Default 0.064 m matches the human-average IPD.
stereoscopic.options.convergence.name: Convergence distance
stereoscopic.options.convergence.tooltip: Off-axis convergence depth in blocks. Objects at this depth sit at the screen plane (zero parallax); closer objects pop out, farther ones recede. 0 = parallel-axis (no shear, everything pops out).
